icon_specifications.stroke_weight: 2px consistent stroke, rounded caps and joins
icon_specifications.style: Rounded outline icons with occasional single filled accent (saffron or green); warm, friendly, geometric.

color_usage.confirm: #E4572E (ripe tomato) for the one-tap confirm action only

navigation.name: plan
navigation.description: A calendar-grid of small bowls. The 30-day plan home.

navigation.name: today
navigation.description: A single bowl with a sun/clock hint. Today's meals.

navigation.name: ledger
navigation.description: A wallet with a level line. The spend ledger.

navigation.name: profile
navigation.description: A person with a small leaf. Preferences and profile.

navigation.name: menu
navigation.description: Three rounded horizontal strokes. Mobile navigation.

meal_slots.name: breakfast
meal_slots.description: A cup with steam and a sunrise arc.

meal_slots.name: lunch
meal_slots.description: A bowl with a sun overhead.

macros_and_nutrition.name: calories
macros_and_nutrition.description: A soft flame in a rounded outline. Estimated calories.

macros_and_nutrition.name: estimate
macros_and_nutrition.description: A '~' inside a soft circle. Marks every nutrition figure as an estimate.

macros_and_nutrition.name: macro-balanced
macros_and_nutrition.description: Three level arcs in a bowl. Macro-fit / balanced.

budget.name: budget-cap
budget.description: A rupee inside a rounded cap/ceiling line. The hard monthly cap.

budget.name: under-cap
budget.description: A rupee with a green level line below the cap. Stayed under budget.

budget.name: coupon
budget.description: A tag with a small cut/percentage. Applied offer.

budget.name: price-alert
budget.description: A rupee with a small up-arrow in amber. Price nudged up.

budget.name: spend-bar
budget.description: A horizontal progress bar with a cap marker. The ledger meter.

actions.name: confirm
actions.description: A bowl/plate with a check, drawn in tomato. THE one-tap confirm action.

actions.name: swap
actions.description: Two curved arrows around a bowl. Swap this meal for a fallback.

actions.name: skip
actions.description: A bowl with a forward-skip arrow. Skip this slot.

actions.name: rate
actions.description: A thumbs / star for post-meal rating that teaches preferences.

actions.name: edit-plan
actions.description: A pencil over the plan grid. Adjust preferences/plan.

actions.name: paste-profile
actions.description: A clipboard/chat-bubble into a bowl. Paste the onboarding-prompt JSON.

safety_and_status.name: allergen-block
safety_and_status.description: An allergen (peanut/shellfish) inside a red no-entry ring. HARD block — deliberately distinct from confirm.

safety_and_status.name: jain
safety_and_status.description: A leaf mark for Jain diet filter.

safety_and_status.name: order-confirmed
safety_and_status.description: A bowl with a green check. Order placed after your tap.

safety_and_status.name: on-the-way
safety_and_status.description: A scooter with a bowl. Tracking a live order.

safety_and_status.name: error
safety_and_status.description: A bowl with an exclamation in allergen-red. Order failed / needs attention.

safety_and_status.name: info-estimate
safety_and_status.description: An 'i' in a soft slate circle. Opens the estimate/FSSAI disclaimer.

usage_guidelines.spacing: 8px minimum padding; 4px gap between icon and label
usage_guidelines.animation: Subtle 150ms ease transitions on state change; no bounce.
color_discipline: Tomato is reserved for the confirm action icon only.
Allergen red is reserved for hard-block/error only and must look distinct from confirm tomato.
Every calorie/macro icon appears with the 'estimate' tilde treatment nearby.
Never signal meaning by colour alone; always pair with shape and label.
